text: The room is dim and filled with the soft hum of technology—each light, each faint reflection punctuates the silence. The computer screen glows with cryptic text, suggesting transition or malfunction. I feel a curious blend of anticipation and isolation. Here, human presence is replaced by the language of machines and shadows. This is a place of thought, and perhaps a touch of unease: a reminder of how small I am within the vast machinery of our constructed world.
